arn.description: Amazon Resource Name for IAM and API interactions with the signing profile

id.description: Unique identifier for the signing profile, used for resource referencing

platform_display_name.description: Human-readable name for the platform associated with the signing profile

revocation_record.description: Details about revocation, useful for audit and compliance checks

status.description: Current status of the signing profile, indicating availability or revocation

tags_all.description: All tags applied to the signing profile for organization and categorization

version.description: Specific version of the signing profile for tracking changes

version_arn.description: Amazon Resource Name for the specific version of the signing profile
